title: Raccoon Removal in East Tremont, Bronx | $900-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in East Tremont, Bronx. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving East Tremont Ave & surrounding areas. Call today for a free quote!
intro: East Tremont residents face unique wildlife challenges, with raccoons frequently invading attics, crawl spaces, and garbage areas in the neighborhood's mix of multi-family homes and apartment buildings. Our professional raccoon removal services protect East Tremont properties from structural damage, health hazards, and the persistent noise these nocturnal animals create. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective raccoon removal with guaranteed results for homeowners and property managers throughout the East Tremont community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served East Tremont for years, understanding the specific raccoon issues affecting homes near Crotona Park and along East Tremont Avenue. Our licensed technicians provide same-day emergency service, humane removal methods, and comprehensive exclusion work that prevents re-entry, all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: East Tremont's diverse housing stock—from pre-war apartment buildings to single-family homes near St. Raymond's Cemetery—offers numerous entry points for raccoons seeking shelter and food. The proximity to Crotona Park and tree-lined residential streets creates ideal conditions for raccoon populations, making professional wildlife control essential for protecting your property.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in East Tremont?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in East Tremont typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, location of the nest, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, removal, exclusion work to seal entry points, and cleanup services. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in East Tremont, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in East Tremont due to the area's proximity to Crotona Park, mature trees, and abundant food sources from residential and commercial properties. They often nest in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces of multi-family buildings and homes, especially during spring birthing season and colder months when they seek shelter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my East Tremont property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in East Tremont for urgent raccoon situations. Initial trapping and removal typically begins within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons and whether babies are present. We then seal all entry points to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in East Tremont humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, NYC-approved trapping and removal methods that comply with all New York State wildlife regulations. We never use poisons or lethal traps. Our licensed technicians safely relocate raccoons and, when babies are present, ensure the entire family is removed together before sealing entry points.
